name: Decision Support System (DSS): What It Is and How
snippet:
A decision support system (DSS) is a computerized program that analyzes data in an organization or business , enabling managers to decide courses of action.
A decision support system is an algorithmic tool that compiles and models a company's data, allowing operations managers to easily interpret the information and reach an informed decision.

name: Decision support system
snippet:
A decision support system ( DSS ) is an information system that supports business or organizational decision-making activities . Read more
A decision support system (DSS) is an information system that supports business or organizational decision-making activities.

name: What is a decision support system (DSS)?
snippet:
25 Sept 2024 — A decision support system (DSS) is a computer program used to improve a company's decision-making capabilities . Read more
A decision support system (DSS) is a computer program used to improve a company's decision-making capabilities. It analyzes large amounts of data and presents an organization with the best possible options available.

name: What Are Decision Support Systems? - business.com
snippet: A decision support system (DSS) is a computer-based system that collects, organizes and analyzes business data, similar to business intelligence tools. Leaders use this data to manage operations, plan strategy and evaluate potential outcomes.
